today.title: Today's Meds
today.emptyHint: Add medications in the Meds tab to get started
today.instruction: Tap "Take" when you've taken your medication

medList.emptyBody:
Tap the + button below
to add your first medication
medList.deleteConfirm:
Delete "{{name}}"?
This will also remove all dose records.

form.hint: Set the name, dosage, and timing for your medication. You can edit these later.
form.frequencyHint: Choose how often you take this medication
form.timeHint: You'll get a reminder notification at these times
form.dosageRequired: Please enter a dosage greater than 0
form.timeRequired: Please add at least one time

history.title: Your History
history.adherenceHint: Tap a date to see details for that day
history.tapHint: Tap any date on the calendar

settings.title: Settings
settings.uiSizeDesc: Large text is available with Pro
settings.subscribeDesc: Unlimited meds, PDF/CSV export, widget, text size options
settings.madeWith: Made with care for your health

paywall.title: Unlock Pro
paywall.description: Get the most out of your medication tracking with these extra features.
paywall.terms: By subscribing, you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. Subscriptions auto-renew and will be charged unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the renewal date.
